SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct

Class ForToWhile

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.JavaSourceElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.JavaProgramElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct.ProgramTransformer
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct.ForToWhile
All Implemented Interfaces:
Expression, ExpressionContainer, ModelElement, NamedModelElement, NamedProgramElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, Reference, MemberReference, NameReference, PackageReferenceContainer, ReferencePrefix, ReferenceSuffix, TypeReference, TypeReferenceContainer, TypeReferenceInfix, SourceElement, Statement, StatementContainer, EqualsModProperty<SourceElement>, SyntaxElement
public class ForToWhile extends ProgramTransformer
converts a for-loop to a while loop. Invariant and other rules cannot be performed on for but only on while loops. It makes uses of the ForToWhileTransformation to create a transformed loop body which is then put into the corresponding context.

Example

 for (int i = 0; i < 100; i++) {
     if (i == 2)
         continue;
     if (i == 3)
         break;
 }
is translated to 
 _label1: {
     int i = 0;
     while (i < 100) {
         _label0: {
             if (i == 2)
                 break _label0;
             if (i == 3)
                 break _label1;
         }
         i++;
     }
 }
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • ForToWhile

      public ForToWhile(SchemaVariable innerLabel, SchemaVariable outerLabel, Statement loop)
      creates an loop to while - ProgramTransformer
      Parameters:
      innerLabel - the label used to handle continue
      outerLabel - the label used to handle break (only needed for do-while-loops)
      loop - the LoopStatement contained by the meta construct

    • transform

      public ProgramElement[] transform(ProgramElement pe, Services services, SVInstantiations svInst)
      Description copied from class: ProgramTransformer
      performs the program transformation needed for symbolic program transformation
      Specified by:
      transform in class ProgramTransformer
      Parameters:
      pe - the ProgramElement on which the execution is performed
      services - the Services with all necessary information about the java programs
      svInst - the instantiations of the schemavariables
      Returns:
      the transformated program

    • neededInstantiations

      public ImmutableList<SchemaVariable> neededInstantiations(SVInstantiations svInst)
      return a list of the SV that are relevant to this UnwindLoop
      Overrides:
      neededInstantiations in class ProgramTransformer
      Parameters:
      svInst - the instantiations so far - ignored
      Returns:
      a list of 0 to 2 schema variables (outer/inner label)
